name: GIGABYTE MC13-LE3 Server Motherboard - Socket AM5 - AMD B650E Chipset - ASPEED AST2600 BMC - PCIe 5.0 x16 slot - PCIe 4.0 x4 slot - MCIO 8i Connector - M.2 Slot (Gen5 x4) - 2x 25Gb/s LAN - 2x 1Gb/s LAN - COM port - VGA - 2x USB 3.2 Gen1 (MC13-LE3)
shortName: GIGABYTE MC13-LE3 Server Motherboard - Socket AM5 - AMD B650E Chipset
description: Server-grade AM5 motherboard with BMC, PCIe 5.0, and dual 25Gb/s LAN for data center applications.
